# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in `ghx`, please do not open a public issue.
Instead, report it privately using GitHub Security Advisories:

https://github.com/onnga-wasabi/ghx/security/advisories/new

If you are unable to use GitHub Security Advisories, please open a private discussion by creating an issue
tagged with `security` and include enough details for us to reproduce the issue (steps, logs, and minimal
example data).

## Response

We will acknowledge your report as soon as possible. Exact timelines depend on severity and available
resources, but we aim to respond within 72 hours.

## Credits

We appreciate responsible disclosure. If your report leads to a fix, we will credit you in the release
notes or advisory (unless you request otherwise).
